Zero Proof. All Party.

Benefits

Aplós spirits are infused with functional ingredients and formulated to enhance the immediate pleasure of taste, and the slow pleasures of the mind that follow.

Infused with functional botanicals to help you unwind, connect and calm.

02

03

  • Functional Ingredients

    Infused with functional botanicals to help you unwind, connect and calm.

  • Premium Quality

    Crafted by award-winning mixologists using only the highest quality, all-natural ingredients.

  • Zero Sugar and Zero Hangover

    Aplós spirits have no sugar added and each serving is 10 calories or less. Designed as an alcohol alternative without the calories and hangover, making it a healthy ritual that you can maintain.

In the Press

“Aplós Calme serves up a sleek bubbly, citrus-led liquor alternative enhanced with sustainable, organically grown broad-spectrum hemp.”

Reviews

Allison J.

“I am on a year-long alcohol free journey and this is making it so much easier. I am still alcohol free, yet still feel like I am having a party.”

Joy G.

“I wanted to cut down my alcohol intake, but I also wanted some type of ritual to mark the end of the work day. Aplós has helped me reduce my alcohol intake significantly.”

Lance K.

“I think Aplos is both my wife and my favorite NA choice by far. Once our kids go to bed, Aplos is our favorite wind down drink!”

Our Philosophy

Aplós is a recalibration - a chance to slow down and experience what we might usually ignore: the simple things that ultimately add more substance to our lives.
